title: itsyou.ooo — Only you can change you
description: A daily reminder of the Stoic boundary between what is up to you and what is not. itsyou.ooo is available for acquisition.

sections.heading: itsyou.ooo
sections.content:
Only you can change you.
Only concern yourself with things you can change.

This is not a slogan.
It is a return to what has always been true.

sections.heading: The Name
sections.content:
**itsyou.ooo**

Two simple words that carry the entire weight of Stoic philosophy.

*It's you.*  
Not your circumstances.  
Not other people.  
Not the past.  
Not the noise of the world.

You are the only variable you can ever truly move.

The domain is short. Distinctive. Unforgettable.  
The ".ooo" extension feels like the quiet moment of realization — the breath that follows understanding.

sections.heading: The Philosophy
sections.content:
Stoicism has always been brutally clear about one thing:

There is a dividing line between what is up to you and what is not.

- Your judgments
- Your choices
- Your effort
- Your character

These are yours.

Everything else — the actions of others, the outcomes, the weather of life — belongs to the realm of externals.

Most people exhaust themselves trying to control the uncontrollable.  
The Stoic does the opposite.

This domain exists as a daily reminder of that boundary.

sections.heading: Why This Domain Works
sections.content:
- **Instant meaning** — No explanation needed. The name *is* the philosophy.
- **Personal power** — It speaks directly to the individual. No collective, no savior, no external fix.
- **Premium & ownable** — Short, brandable, and distinctive enough to stand alone as a powerful personal or organizational identity.
- **Timeless + modern** — Ancient truth delivered through a clean, contemporary name.

Ideal for:
- Stoic coaching or philosophy platforms
- Personal development brands
- Mental resilience and leadership work
- Writers, thinkers, or creators building around self-mastery
- Anyone who wants their digital home to begin with a profound truth
You have power over your mind — not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
It's not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.
We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.

sections.heading: The Opportunity
sections.content:
**itsyou.ooo** is available for acquisition.

This is not a domain for everyone.  
It is for the person or organization ready to stand for radical self-ownership — the rare clarity that the only thing worth building is yourself.

The power was never outside you.

Now the name that says so can be yours.
